content: Postgres SKIP LOCKED queue canon: FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED for contention-free claim; lease/visibility timeout (visible_at / leased_until) for crash recovery; lease-token (claim_token) fencing where every completion write carries AND lease_token = $token so a zombie worker whose lease was reclaimed cannot commit over the newer owner; stale-claim reaper; attempt cap -> dead letter; exponential backoff with jitter expressed as a future available_at. Incrementing attempts AT CLAIM (not at failure) is what bounds a poison job that kills the worker before it can report.
